scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n b,f "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.dev:lan: concurrently -k -n b,f "npm run dev:lan --prefix backend" "npm run dev:lan --prefix frontend"
scripts.start:prod: npm run build --prefix frontend && cross-env HOST=0.0.0.0 SERVE_SPA=1 npm run start --prefix backend
